content_blocks.text:
5 writing a program
this is a new chapter
95
Let’5 put some muscle in our methods. We dabbled with variables, played 
with a few objects, and wrote a little code. But we were weak. We need more tools. Like 
operators. We need more operators 50 we can do something a little more interesting than, 
say, bark. And loops. We need loops, but what’5 with the wimpy while loops? We need for 
loops if we’re really serious. Might be useful to generate random numbers. And turn a 
String into an int, yeah, that would be cool. Better learn that too. And why don’t we learn 
it all by building something real, to see what it’5 like to write (and test) a program from scratch. 
Maybe a game, like Battleships. That’5 a heavy-lifting task, 50 it’11 take two chapters to finish. 
We’11 build a simple version in this chapter, and then build a more powerful deluxe version in 
chapter 6.
Extra-Strength Methods
1 can lift 
heavy objects.
